center.name: 蘇格蘭中部地帶
center.summary: 蘇格蘭中部地帶是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red grouse，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found across most parts of Scotland, including Orkney, Shetland and most of the Outer Hebrides; it is only absent from urban areas, such as in the Central Belt, and other coastal lowlands in the south and east.{{cite book | last1=Balmer | first1=Dawn E
